topStories.title: Assam Election 2026: What BJP and Congress promise in their manifestos
topStories.description: BJP released its 31 point “Sankalp Patra” and Congress leader Rahul Gandhi, State party president Gaurav Gogoi and other senior leaders released the “Raijor Istahar”, or people manifesto in Assam.

topStories.title: Assam CM Himanta issues ‘life imprisonment’ warning to Cong's Khera over claims on wife's ‘three passports’
topStories.description: Congress leader Pawan Khera on Sunday alleged Sarma's wife Riniki Bhuyan holds three passports – of UAE, Antigua-Barbuda and Egypt.

topStories.title: Gold below Rs 1.5 lakh, silver down Rs 2,000 on dollar strength, Trump’s power plant threat to Iran. What should investors do?
topStories.description: Gold and silver prices dipped on Monday amid a stronger dollar and escalating Middle East tensions, dampening hopes for U.S. Federal Reserve rate cuts.  Traders are now largely discounting any rate reductions this year. Experts advise caution, suggesting profit-booking on rallies and waiting for dips to initiate fresh positions.

topStories.title: Iran to respond 'in kind' as Trump issues expletive-laden Hormuz threat — ‘whole region is going to burn’
topStories.description: Since the start of the war on 28 February, Trump has repeatedly threatened to attack Iran's critical civilian and energy infrastructure, but has thus far refrained from doing so, citing ongoing negotiations. The deadline issued on Sunday, however, appeared to be a final extension.

topStories.title: US-Iran war looking at 45-day ceasefire? Report says efforts underway as clock ticks down to Trump's Hormuz deadline
topStories.description: Last-ditch efforts are underway to seal a truce in the next 48 hours, prior to the expiry of US President Donald Trump's deadline to Tehran to accept a deal and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: ‘War has been a failure’: US politicians call trump ‘unhinged madman’ after expletive-laden threat to Iran
topStories.description: Chris Murphy urged constitutional lawyers to consider the 25th Amendment due to Trump's erratic behavior. Iranian officials deemed his threats as delusional.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court’s Sabarimala review bench reflects diversity across faith, region and gender
dailyNews.description: SC's decision to constitute a nine-judge bench for the Sabarimala review is not merely a procedural step to revive a long-pending constitutional reference.

dailyNews.title: Davanagere South bypoll: Cong faces rebel threat, disquiet among Muslims
dailyNews.description: The Congress faces internal strife in the Davanagere South by-election due to discontent over candidate choice, risking voter support from the Muslim community.

dailyNews.title: Pair of Democrat lawmakers slam 'blockade of fuel' to Cuba, 'economic bombing' after visit to island
dailyNews.description: Reps. Pramila Jayapal and Jonathan Jackson said after a Congressional delegation to Cuba that U.S. economic restrictions on the island represented an "illegal U.S. blockade of fuel."

dailyNews.title: New Hampshire suspect who shot officer and triggered massive manhunt killed in police gunfight
dailyNews.description: Suspect who allegedly shot a New Hampshire police officer is killed in a gunfight after a massive manhunt that included a shelter-in-place order.

dailyNews.title: Baby among 3 dead in holiday horror as Easter egg hunt turns deadly
dailyNews.description: Three people were killed after high winds knocked down a tree onto a group of people in Germany during an Easter egg hunt on Sunday morning, police said.

dailyNews.title: Artemis II astronaut marvels at 'beauty of creation' in Easter message from deep space
dailyNews.description: Victor Glover delivers a powerful Easter message from the Artemis II Orion capsule, calling Earth a beautiful oasis in the emptiness of the cosmos.

dailyNews.title: Warnock likens pro-Trump Christian leaders to those who used Scripture to defend slavery
dailyNews.description: Sen. Warnock compares Christian leaders backing Trump to those who justified slavery, saying their faith-based support for the president is misguided.

dailyNews.title: Dawn Staley gives classy answer after Geno Auriemma question following national title loss: 'It's UCLA's day'
dailyNews.description: Dawn Staley praised UCLA after the Gamecocks' championship loss, refusing to discuss her viral exchange with UConn's Geno Auriemma post-Final Four.

dailyNews.title: Savannah Guthrie's Easter message reveals anguish as mom missing 63 days
dailyNews.description: Savannah Guthrie delivers an emotional Easter message about faith and doubt as her mother Nancy Guthrie remains missing after 63 days in Arizona.

dailyNews.title: Ex-CIA station chief reveals how agency exploited Iranian communication channels during airman rescue
dailyNews.description: Former CIA station chief Dan Hoffman says the agency tracked Iranian forces and ran a deception operation to help rescue a downed U.S. airman.

dailyNews.title: Painter sues Bill Belichick over injuries allegedly suffered while working at his home
dailyNews.description: North Carolina football coach Bill Belichick is sued over a painter's alleged fall and injuries at his Nantucket, Massachusetts, property in June 2024.

dailyNews.title: Arnold Schwarzenegger's son follows his famous father's footsteps with first place bodybuilding win
dailyNews.description: Joseph Baena, son of Arnold Schwarzenegger, takes home first place at the INBA Iron Gladiator natural bodybuilding competition in Southern California.

topStories.title: Trump Revels in Threats to Commit War Crimes in Iran
topStories.description: The president said he would bomb Iran “back to the Stone Ages.” Until this administration, American leaders had insisted they were trying to follow international law in war.

topStories.title: This Is Not China’s War, but Beijing Started Preparing for It Years Ago
topStories.description: Long concerned about geopolitical crises, China redoubled efforts to secure energy security when President Trump started raising the stakes in his first term.

topStories.title: Stephen Miller Is Still Pursuing His Immigration Agenda, but More Quietly
topStories.description: The architect of President Trump’s mass deportation campaign wants “a moratorium on immigration from third world countries until we can heal ourselves as a nation.” The chaos in Minneapolis has not pushed him off that course.

topStories.title: Trump's Iran ultimatum and signals of a possible deal keep investors on tenterhooks
topStories.description: Investors head into what could be the most consequential week of the Iran conflict, scrambling to position for binary outcomes: an imminent deal or further escalation.

topStories.title: Japan, South Korea stocks rise as investors assess Trump's Iran war comments, extended deadline
topStories.description: In an expletive-filled social media post, Trump also vowed to bring "Hell" to the country after the U.S. forces rescued an American airman in Iran last week.

dailyNews.title: Trump vows Iran will be 'living in Hell' by Tuesday if Strait of Hormuz deadline missed
dailyNews.description: "Tuesday will be Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day, all wrapped up in one, in Iran. There will be nothing like it!!!" Trump said in a Truth Social post.

dailyNews.title: Warsh nomination moves ahead, putting Trump's competing Fed plans on a collision course
dailyNews.description: A Senate committee will consider Kevin Warsh's nomination even as one of its members still plans to block it.

dailyNews.title: "WE GOT HIM!," Trump declares after U.S. airman rescued deep inside Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump hailed the rescue of a U.S. airman who was missing almost two days inside Iran — and threatened to hit power plants if Iran doesn't reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: 4/5: CBS Weekend News
dailyNews.description: Latest details on daring mission to rescue U.S. airman from Iran after fighter jet shot down; Trump sends profanity-laden threat to Iran.

dailyNews.title: Missing U.S. crew member from downed fighter jet rescued in Iran, Trump says
dailyNews.description: A U.S. crew member who went missing when an F-15E fighter jet was shot down over a remote area of Iran has been rescued by U.S. forces.

dailyNews.title: Latest on Iran: U.S. airman rescued, Trump makes profanity-laced ultimatum
dailyNews.description: Charlie D'Agata and Taurean Small have the latest news on the Iran war, including details on the rescue of a U.S. airman whose fighter jet was shot down and President Trump's new demand for the Iranians to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens Tuesday strikes on Iran's power plants and bridges in profanity-laden post
dailyNews.description: President Trump threatened to hit Iranian power plants and bridges on Tuesday as he posted another ultimatum on social media Sunday morning. "Open the F*****' Strait, you crazy bastards, or you'll be living in Hell," the president wrote. Taurean Small reports

dailyNews.title: Trump calls rescue of F-15E airman an ‘Easter Miracle’
dailyNews.description: In a text message to “Meet the Press” moderator Kristen Welker, President Trump reacted to U.S. forces safely rescuing the second F-15E crew member of a two-seat fighter jet that went down over Iran on Friday.

dailyNews.title: Trump again threatens Iran's infrastructure ahead of his latest Strait of Hormuz deadline
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has threatened major strikes on Iran's energy infrastructure and bridges ahead of his latest deadline to open the Strait of Hormuz

dailyNews.title: Sen. Kaine skeptical Congress will pass $1.5T military budget
dailyNews.description: Sen. Tim Kaine, D-Va., expressed skepticism on “Meet the Press” Sunday about the Trump administration’s 2027 budget plan, which includes a request of $1.5 trillion from Congress to fund the Defense Department.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
